Video.summary: Fail Center showcases the funniest fail videos matched with comedic sports commentary.

Video.title: Episode 3

Video.title: Episode 4

Video.summary: A flower girl who picks her - nose; a garbage truck that slides on ice; and a groom - who passes out.
Video.title: Episode 510

Video.summary: Santa falls off a roof; a cat attacks the camera; and a man gets tangled up - in his automatic seatbelt.
Video.title: Episode 512

Video.summary: Videos include a dog stealing a Frisbee, an unhappy birthday boy; and a falling football coach.
Video.title: Episode 513

Video.summary: Highlights include talking dogs, musical cats, trampoline mishaps, DIY fails, and “Thought Bubble Theater.”
Video.title: Episode 1401

Video.summary: Clips include a bad limo driver, a girl mailing her brother, a hungry kid, and a creepy pacifier prank.
Video.title: Episode 1402

Video.summary: A bad limo driver, a girl boxing up her brother, a kid sneaking cookies, and a dad’s rat prank.
Video.title: Episode 1403
